memoryAudit.method: same-session baseline heap usage -> 3 scroll/nav/wait cycles -> forced Runtime.gc/HeapProfiler.collectGarbage after each cycle -> final heap snapshot summary

principles.summary: No explicit color-scheme/dark-mode signal observed; Animations present; reduced-motion not verified

findings.title: No explicit color-scheme/dark-mode signal observed
findings.evidence: computed root colorScheme='normal'; dark condition not separately captured in this batch.
findings.suggestedFix: Declare color-scheme support and provide a usable dark theme via prefers-color-scheme or light-dark().

findings.title: Animations present; reduced-motion not verified
findings.suggestedFix: Wrap non-essential animations in prefers-reduced-motion and reduce/disable motion when requested.

principles.summary: Pending active keyboard/focus/input-modality test; screenshot/DOM evidence is not treated as a pass.
Pending active wayfinding/search/menu-flow test; passive homepage evidence is not treated as a pass.

findings.title: Substantial page chrome/network noise
findings.evidence: HAR recorded 245 requests; script hosts include www.gstatic.com, assets.twitch.tv, k.twitchcdn.net.
findings.suggestedFix: Prioritise core content and defer or remove distracting ads, trackers, popups, and non-essential chrome.

principles.summary: Mobile layout showed no horizontal overflow.
Primary homepage entry point rendered; task completion flow not exercised.
CLS above good threshold (0.43); LCP above good threshold (9.2s); Total blocking time is high (718ms)

findings.title: CLS above good threshold (0.43)
findings.suggestedFix: Reserve space for late-loading media/ads and avoid inserting content above existing content after render.

findings.title: LCP above good threshold (9.2s)
findings.suggestedFix: Improve LCP by prioritizing the hero/content resource, reducing render-blocking work, and optimizing server/critical CSS delivery.

findings.title: Total blocking time is high (718ms)
findings.suggestedFix: Reduce main-thread JavaScript by splitting, deferring, and removing non-critical third-party work.

findings.title: CLS above good threshold (0.43)
findings.suggestedFix: Reserve space for late-loading media/ads and avoid inserting content above existing content after render.

principles.summary: axe found 5 violation groups; Unnamed controls or links detected

findings.title: axe found 5 violation groups
findings.evidence: axe violations: autocomplete-valid(serious,1 nodes), heading-order(moderate,2 nodes), nested-interactive(serious,1 nodes), region(moderate,2 nodes), role-img-alt(serious,1 nodes)
findings.suggestedFix: Fix the reported axe violations with semantic HTML, valid ARIA, accessible names, labels, and sufficient contrast.

findings.title: Unnamed controls or links detected
findings.suggestedFix: Give every interactive control/link a visible label or accurate accessible name.

findings.title: Lighthouse best-practices score 73
findings.suggestedFix: Review Lighthouse best-practices failures and fix console errors, deprecated APIs, unsafe patterns, and browser compatibility issues.

findings.title: Low non-JS discoverability (1%)
findings.suggestedFix: Server-render the primary content and metadata so crawlers and no-JavaScript users can access the page.

findings.title: Large third-party/network surface
findings.suggestedFix: Audit third-party scripts/requests and remove, defer, or sandbox anything not essential to the core task.

principles.summary: Pending active no-JS/offline/reload resilience test; manifest/service-worker presence alone is not treated as a pass.
html lang='en-GB'; deeper locale flows not tested.
Pending active consent/account/commerce-flow review for dark patterns; passive homepage evidence is not treated as a pass.
Heavy transfer on initial load (3.0 MB)

findings.title: Heavy transfer on initial load (3.0 MB)
findings.evidence: HAR recorded 245 requests and 3017123 transferred bytes.
findings.suggestedFix: Reduce initial bytes by compressing assets, lazy-loading non-critical media, and removing unused scripts.

findings.title: Low non-JS discoverability (1%)
findings.suggestedFix: Server-render the primary content and metadata so crawlers and no-JavaScript users can access the page.

principles.summary: Same-session memory pass retained -38.3 MB after interaction cycles and forced GC; no monotonic leak signal above threshold.

verdict: Homepage batch: 8 principles with issues; top concerns: high be-fast-and-stable: CLS above good threshold (0.43); high be-discoverable: Low non-JS discoverability (1%); high be-inclusive: axe found 5 violation groups.
_caveats: Scale batch: no Lighthouse, LCP or INP in this pass; coordinator CDP data should fill objective metrics.
Dark-mode/reduced-motion are inferred from probes unless separately captured.
Memory principle pending rigorous same-session recheck; no pass/issue asserted from single/coarse heap snapshots.
Memory was rechecked with same-session baseline, 3 interaction cycles, forced GC, and final heap snapshot; still a homepage smoke test, not full memlab trace attribution.
Passive-only principles patched: trustworthy/resilient/natural-interactions/guided-navigation require active flow testing and are not counted as passes.

Lighthouse/trace/reduced-motion video were not collected in the original batch; future batches include them and this site needs supplemental evidence for high-confidence performance/reduced-motion claims.
Supplemental Lighthouse/trace/reduced-motion evidence collected and merged.
